message:
fix(persist): serialize stream consumer groups and XSETID in AOF output

to_aof_commands() now emits XSETID for streams with an explicit
last-generated-id, and XGROUP CREATE for each consumer group. Without
this, consumer groups and stream metadata were silently lost on
AOF replay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
